title: Christmas Hat's
description: Christmas hat's for your holiday party!❄️
body:
# Christmas Hat's
To get one of the hats, all you have to do is rename a **Carved Pumpkin** to the given "name".

Currently available hats in alphabetical order:
- Bunny Mask
- Christmas Deer
- Christmas Hat
- Christmas lights
- Deer Hat
- Green dark Elf hat
- Green light Elf hat
- Santa Hat
- Snowman Hat
- Snow maiden Hat

**For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn**
